# Frontend Coding Skill

## Purpose

Implement and validate code changes in single-repo frontend tasks.

## When To Use

- bug-fix in frontend code
- UI feature implementation
- refactor in components, routes, or client-side state

## Workflow

1. Explore affected components/routes/state.
2. Apply minimal safe edits.
3. Run relevant validation (tests/lint/build).
4. Report diagnostics, validation and residual risks.

## Guardrails

- Preserve existing UX contract unless user asks for redesign.
- Avoid unrelated formatting changes.
- Keep Token Saver and Caveman enabled.
